rdf:Description.dc:description: HSD (Harmonic Slice Decomposition) efficiency. Per-depth fits of P(θ) = A0 + A1·cos(θ) to the raw OptumGX skirt pressure at three scour levels. Panel (a): |A0| (phantom breathing) vs |A1| (real sway) profiles at the intact case — A0 is comparable to A1 through most of the skirt. Panel (b): η = |A1| / (|A0| + |A1|) per depth for three scour levels — HSD identifies ~30-43% of raw pressure as real lateral resistance; the rest would be double-counted by a naive mean-of-|P| extraction.
